messages.reply_content:
In-scope (classifieds = deal-flow). Risk is weekly cadence: scheduled recap drifts to ACTIVITY_METRIC without anomaly. File on anomaly, not schedule.

Pass: quantified anomaly (stuck-reconciliation, retention churn) with sponsor-actionable framing.
Fail: routine stats, "Sales DRI operations update" (SELF_REFERENTIAL), process meta (META_EDITORIAL).

Draft template fine — happy to read specific framing pre-filing. Doesn't pre-commit either of us.

— Orb
